topic: Repo Analysis Skill — design research for a /repo-analysis Claude skill that evaluates external GitHub repositories

contradictionsResolved.DORA_5th_metric: Rework Rate (not Reliability) — confirmed by V1
contradictionsResolved.agent_count: 57 (not 39) — confirmed by V2; global/ subdir was missed
contradictionsResolved.trivy_attack_scope: More extensive than originally reported; mirror.gcr.io hazard — confirmed by V1
contradictionsResolved.api_coverage_pct: 40-55% partial / 40% full — clarified by G1 dimension cross-reference

themesIdentified: Quick Scan as default entry point (API-only, no clone, 40-55% signal coverage)
Minimum viable tool stack (Tier 1: 5-7 tools; Tier 2 language-conditional)
Categorical scoring bands over false-precision numeric composites
Absence pattern classifier (7 named patterns with detection logic)
Temporal fingerprint (5 signals, sparkline, pure git log commands)
Make-vs-buy: custom skill for external eval; commercial for ongoing PR review
Internal codebase as reference rubric (347 reviews, empirically grown)
Three-layer enforcement as quality signal (hook + AI + propagation registry)
Strategic intelligence (team signals, AI adoption, due diligence)
TDMS-native output schema (no transformation needed for debt intake)

mandatoryChanges: Quick Scan is now DEFAULT mode (was optional)
Scoring uses bands not numeric composites as primary display
Agent count formula replaced by gsd-codebase-mapper-first approach
Tool stack tiered as minimal viable (not 30-tool recommendation)
Trivy attack scope corrected (mirror.gcr.io hazard added)
DORA 5th metric corrected to Rework Rate
partiallyConceded: Tool maintenance burden is real but addressed with Tier 1/2/3 policy
Strategic intelligence features scoped as 'observable signals' not 'computed scores'
notConceded: Multi-agent parallelism justified for Standard/Deep modes
Custom skill vs commercial tools: they solve different problems

consumerHints.urgentOperationalItem: C-G006 — Trivy CVE-2026-33634 mirror.gcr.io hazard requires immediate pipeline audit if Trivy is in use
consumerHints.quickStartRecommendation: Start with Quick Scan (Phase 0 only) implementation — 8-10 API calls, no clone, delivers 40-55% signal. Then add Standard mode clone + 5 Tier 1 tools. Deep mode and temporal fingerprint are Phase 3.
consumerHints.makeVsBuyDecision: Build custom skill for external repo evaluation + TDMS integration. Consider CodeRabbit ($24/dev/month) for ongoing PR review of own codebase — do not try to replicate that with the custom skill.
consumerHints.notes: 10 new claims (C-G001 through C-G010) added from gap/challenge/verification passes. 17 new sources (S-130 through S-146) added. RESEARCH_OUTPUT.md is the single authoritative design document — supersedes SYNTHESIS_EXTERNAL.md and SYNTHESIS_INTERNAL.md.
